  fix(http): retry on ECONNRESET
This drives automated versioning + changelog.

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Added/updated JSDoc for public API changes
- [ ] No tokens, cookies, or personal data in code, tests, or fixtures
